info.name: Barter Backend API
info.description: API collection for Barter Backend with Auth, Users, and Products

request.description:
Request OTP for email or phone number

Identifier can be:
- Email: user@example.com
- Phone: 10-digit number (e.g., 9876543210)

exec: pm.expect(true, hasAccess ? 'accessToken saved to variables' : `No accessToken in response (status ${pm.response.code})`).to.equal(true);

request.description:
Verify OTP code and get authentication tokens

Required:
- identifier: Email or 10-digit phone
- code: 6-digit OTP

Save the accessToken to the postman variable {{accessToken}} for authenticated requests

Refresh access/refresh token pair using valid refresh token.

Body:
- refreshToken: string
Get authenticated user profile (requires valid access token).

Update authenticated user profile (PROTECTED).

At least one field is required:
- userName
- mobileNumber (set null to clear)
- email (set null to clear)
- profilePicture (set null to clear)

Generate pre-signed upload URL for profile picture (PROTECTED).

Body:
- fileName: string

Create a user profile.

Required:
- userName (min 3 chars)

Optional:
- mobileNumber
- email
- profilePicture
- allowPhone (default false)
- allowEmail (default false)
Get all categories (PUBLIC)
Get a single category by ID with products and subcategories (PUBLIC)

header.description: Admin API key - default dev key: admin123

request.description:
Create a new category (ADMIN ONLY)

Required headers:
- X-Admin-Key: Your admin key

Required fields:
- name: string (max 100 chars)

Optional fields:
- parentCategoryId: UUID of parent category for nested categories

Update a category (ADMIN ONLY)

Optional fields:
- name: string
- parentCategoryId: UUID

Validation:
- Cannot create circular parent references
- Category name must be unique

Delete a category (ADMIN ONLY)

Restrictions:
- Cannot delete if it has child categories
- Cannot delete if it has associated products

Get all products with optional filters (PUBLIC)

Query Parameters (all optional):
- status: ACTIVE | INACTIVE | RESERVED | EXCHANGED | REMOVED
- categoryId: UUID
- ownerId: UUID
- excludeOwnerId: UUID (exclude owner's products)
- search: Search term for title or description
- limit: integer (1..100, default 20)
- cursor: string (base64 token for next page)
- locationLat, locationLng, radiusKm: for local filtering

Response format:
{
  items: [product],
  nextCursor: string|null,
  hasMore: boolean
}
Get a single product by ID with all images (PUBLIC)

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Vintage Camera",
  "description": "A beautiful vintage camera in good condition",
  "categoryId": "770e8400-e29b-41d4-a716-446655440002",
  "status": "ACTIVE",
  "requestByMoney": false,
  "isFree": false,
  "locationName": "New York, NY",
  "latitude": 40.7128,
  "longitude": -74.0060,
  "isPreOwned": true,
  "lifecycleVersion": 1,
  "isListed": true
}

request.description:
Create a new product (PROTECTED - requires auth)

Required fields:
- title: string

Optional fields:
- description: string
- categoryId: UUID
- status: ACTIVE | RESERVED | EXCHANGED | REMOVED (default: ACTIVE)
- requestByMoney: boolean (default: false) — allows MONEY and MIXED offers
- isFree: boolean (default: false) — marks product as free; buyers can request with any offer type or no offer (NONE)
- locationName: string
- latitude: number
- longitude: number
- isPreOwned: boolean (default: false)
- lifecycleVersion: positive integer (default: 1)
- isListed: boolean (default: true)

Offer type rules:
- isFree=false, requestByMoney=false → PRODUCT offers only
- isFree=false, requestByMoney=true → PRODUCT, MONEY, or MIXED
- isFree=true → PRODUCT, MONEY, MIXED, or NONE (buyer's choice)

Note: currentOwnerId is automatically set from authenticated user token

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Old Bookshelf",
  "description": "Giving away for free, good condition",
  "categoryId": "770e8400-e29b-41d4-a716-446655440002",
  "status": "ACTIVE",
  "requestByMoney": false,
  "isFree": true,
  "locationName": "New York, NY",
  "latitude": 40.7128,
  "longitude": -74.0060,
  "isPreOwned": true,
  "lifecycleVersion": 1,
  "isListed": true
}

request.description:
Create a free product (PROTECTED - requires auth)

Set isFree=true to mark the product as free.
Buyers can request it with any offer type or with no offer at all (offerType=NONE).

Required fields:
- title: string
- isFree: true

Offer type rules for free products:
- NONE: buyer requests without attaching any offer (default)
- PRODUCT: buyer offers their own product(s) in exchange
- MONEY: buyer offers a cash amount
- MIXED: buyer offers products + cash

Note: currentOwnerId is automatically set from authenticated user token

Generate pre-signed URLs for direct S3 image uploads (PROTECTED - requires auth)

Request Body:
- fileNames: Array of strings (1-6 file names with extensions)

Response: Array of objects with signedUrl, publicUrl, storageKey, fileName

Use the signedUrl to upload files directly to S3. URLs expire in 1 hour.

Register uploaded images in the database after direct S3 upload (PROTECTED - requires auth)

Request Body:
- images: Array of objects
  - storageKey: S3 key from pre-signed URL response
  - url: Public S3 URL
  - isPrimary: boolean (true for first image)

Call this after successfully uploading to the pre-signed URLs.

Note: Only product owner can add images

Transfer product ownership (PROTECTED, only current owner can call)

Request Body:
- newOwnerId: UUID of new owner

Relist an exchanged or removed product (PROTECTED).

Rules:
- Only current owner can relist
- Product status must be EXCHANGED or REMOVED
- Product must not be in cooldown
- Product becomes ACTIVE and isListed=true
- lifecycleVersion increments by 1

Frontend identifiers available on product response:
- isPreOwned
- exchangeCount
- lastExchangedAt

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Updated Bookshelf",
  "description": "Updated description by new owner",
  "categoryId": null,
  "requestByMoney": false,
  "locationName": "Brooklyn, New York",
  "latitude": 40.6782,
  "longitude": -73.9442,
  "isListed": true,
  "isFree": true
}

request.description:
Update product fields (PROTECTED, owner-only).

Allowed fields only:
- title
- description
- categoryId
- requestByMoney
- locationName
- latitude
- longitude
- isListed
- isFree

All other fields are ignored by schema validation and cannot be updated through this endpoint.
Get ownership history of a product (PROTECTED)

Delete a product and all associated images from S3 (PROTECTED)

Note: Only product owner can delete their products

Delete a specific image from a product (PROTECTED)

Path Parameters:
- productId: UUID of the product
- imageId: UUID of the image to delete

Note: Only product owner can delete images from their products

Mark expired inactive products as REMOVED (ADMIN ONLY).

Requires:
- X-Admin-Key header

query.description: Base64 pagination token from previous response nextCursor
Optional: Exclude products by owner UUID

request.description:
Get global product discovery feed with cursor-based pagination (PUBLIC)

**Usage Pattern:**
1. Make initial request without cursor
2. Receive response with { items, nextCursor, hasMore }
3. Display items to user (infinite scroll)
4. When user scrolls near bottom, use nextCursor for next page
5. Repeat until hasMore = false

**Query Parameters:**
- status: ACTIVE (default) | INACTIVE | RESERVED | EXCHANGED | REMOVED
- limit: 1-100 (default: 20)
- cursor: For pagination, base64 encoded token
- categoryId: (optional) Filter by category UUID
- search: (optional) Text search
- excludeOwnerId: (optional) Exclude owner UUID

**Cursor Format:**
The cursor is a base64-encoded token containing:
- createdAt: Product creation timestamp
- id: Product UUID

Do NOT decode or modify the cursor - use it as-is from nextCursor.

**Response Format:**
```json
{
  "items": [{
    "id": "uuid",
    "title": "Product Title",
    "description": "...",
    "status": "ACTIVE",
    "categoryId": "uuid",
    "currentOwnerId": "uuid",
    "latitude": 40.7128,
    "longitude": -74.0060,
    "locationName": "New York, NY",
    "isPreOwned": true,
    "createdAt": "2026-03-25T10:30:00Z",
    "images": [{ "url": "https://...", "isPrimary": true }]
  }],
  "nextCursor": "eyJjcmVhdGVkQXQiOiIyMDI2LTAzLTI1VDEwOjMwOjAwWiIsImlkIjoiNjYwZTg0MDAifQ==",
  "hasMore": true
}
```

**Performance Notes:**
- First page (no cursor) is cached for 30 seconds
- Uses database indexes on status, createdAt, id
- Cursor ensures consistent ordering across pages
- No limit offset issues (common with large offsets)

query.description: Base64 pagination token from previous response
Optional: Exclude products by owner UUID

request.description:
Get location-aware product discovery feed ("near me" mode) (PUBLIC)

**Usage Pattern:**
1. Get user's current GPS coordinates (latitude, longitude)
2. Make request with locationLat, locationLng, radiusKm
3. Products within radius are returned, sorted by distance (nearest first)
4. Use cursor for pagination as with global feed
5. Items maintain distance ranking across pages

**Query Parameters:**
- status: ACTIVE (default) | INACTIVE | RESERVED | EXCHANGED | REMOVED
- limit: 1-100 (default: 20)
- locationLat: User's latitude (REQUIRED for location mode)
- locationLng: User's longitude (REQUIRED for location mode)
- radiusKm: Search radius in km (default: 25, recommended: 5-50)
- cursor: For pagination in location results
- excludeOwnerId: Optional owner UUID to exclude
- categoryId, search: Optional filters

**Location Algorithm:**
1. Bounding box filter: Finds products in rough lat/lng range (fast DB lookup)
2. Haversine distance calculation: Precise distance from user to each product
3. Sort: By distance ASC, then by createdAt DESC (newest items at same distance first)
4. Pagination: Cursor prevents duplicate results across pages

**Response Format:**
```json
{
  "items": [{
    "id": "uuid",
    "title": "Vintage Camera",
    "description": "...",
    "status": "ACTIVE",
    "categoryId": "uuid",
    "currentOwnerId": "uuid",
    "latitude": 40.7150,
    "longitude": -74.0055,
    "locationName": "Manhattan, New York",
    "distance_km": 0.35,
    "isPreOwned": true,
    "createdAt": "2026-03-25T10:30:00Z",
    "images": [{ "url": "https://...", "isPrimary": true }]
  }],
  "nextCursor": "eyJjcmVhdGVkQXQiOiIyMDI2LTAzLTI1VDEwOjMwOjAwWiIsImlkIjoiNjYwZTg0MDAifQ==",
  "hasMore": true
}
```

**Distance Calculation:**
- Uses Haversine formula for great-circle distance
- Accurate for typical barter scenarios (local region)
- Returns approximate distance in response items

**Example Coordinates:**
- New York, NY: 40.7128, -74.0060
- San Francisco, CA: 37.7749, -122.4194
- Austin, TX: 30.2672, -97.7431
- Seattle, WA: 47.6062, -122.3321

**Performance Notes:**
- Database index on latitude, longitude for fast bounding box
- Haversine calculation done in-memory (efficient)
- Results sorted by distance for UX
- Cache NOT used (location queries are user-specific)

Create a product request with offer payload (PROTECTED - requires auth)

Offer type rules (driven by product settings):
- isFree=false, requestByMoney=false → PRODUCT only
- isFree=false, requestByMoney=true → PRODUCT, MONEY, or MIXED
- isFree=true → PRODUCT, MONEY, MIXED, or NONE (buyer's choice; offerType defaults to NONE)

Offer modes:
- PRODUCT: requires offeredProducts only
- MONEY: requires amount only
- MIXED: requires both amount + offeredProducts
- NONE: no offer attached (only for free products)

Workflow:
1. Validate payload and offer shape
2. Fetch target product
3. Block if product unavailable:
   - status not in ACTIVE/RESERVED
   - isListed = false
   - cooldownUntil > now
4. Optional warning if product status is RESERVED
5. Upsert one request thread for (productId, buyerId, sellerId)
6. Mark previous ACTIVE offer as SUPERSEDED (if present)
7. Insert fresh ACTIVE offer + offer products
8. Replace visible products

Ownership rules:
- Buyer cannot request own product
- offeredProducts and visibleProducts must belong to buyer and be active listed products

Response internals include:
- requestStatus
- offerStatus
- currentTurn
- isUpdate

Get a request negotiation thread (PROTECTED).

Returns:
- requestId
- status
- currentTurn
- offer history ordered oldest to newest

Access: only buyer or seller on that request.

Create counter offer (PROTECTED).

Rules:
- Only currentTurn actor can counter
- Existing ACTIVE offer is marked SUPERSEDED
- New ACTIVE offer is inserted
- currentTurn flips to the opposite side
- Request status becomes NEGOTIATING

Accept active offer (PROTECTED).

Behavior:
- Request -> ACCEPTED
- Active offer -> ACCEPTED
- ProductReservation created/updated
- Transaction created/reset -> INITIATED
- Product -> RESERVED
- If another request already held reservation for this product, that previous request is auto-rejected as OVERRIDDEN
- Previous active transaction (if any) is cancelled and pending OTPs invalidated
- response.data.warning is returned when override count reaches last safe threshold

Reject request (PROTECTED).

Behavior:
- Request -> REJECTED
- ACTIVE offer(s) -> REJECTED
- If this request held reservation, reservation is cancelled

Cancel request by buyer or seller (PROTECTED).

Body:
- reason: string (3..500)

Behavior:
- Request -> CANCELLED
- ACTIVE offer(s) -> CANCELLED
- If this request held reservation, reservation is cancelled

List requests created by the authenticated buyer with cursor pagination (PROTECTED).

Query:
- status: PENDING | NEGOTIATING | ACCEPTED | REJECTED | EXPIRED | CANCELLED (optional)
- limit: 1..100 (default 20)
- cursor: base64 pagination token

Response:
{ items: Request[], nextCursor: string|null, hasMore: boolean }

List requests received by the authenticated seller with cursor pagination (PROTECTED).

Query:
- status: PENDING | NEGOTIATING | ACCEPTED | REJECTED | EXPIRED | CANCELLED (optional)
- limit: 1..100 (default 20)
- cursor: base64 pagination token

Get single request details with offers, offered products, and visible products (PROTECTED).

Access: only buyer or seller on that request.

Request counterparty contact reveal (PROTECTED).

Allowed only for accepted reserved requests.
Body:
- note: optional string (max 500)

Approve or reject a specific contact reveal request (PROTECTED).

Body:
- approve: boolean

Get active transaction (status INITIATED or IN_PROGRESS) for current authenticated participant.

Provide at least one:
- requestId
- productId
Buyer generates 6-digit OTP (5 min expiry). Share OTP with seller at exchange time. Transaction status moves to IN_PROGRESS.

Seller verifies buyer OTP. On success:
- transaction -> COMPLETED
- reservation -> COMPLETED
- requested product owner transfers to buyer
- accepted offered products transfer to the counterparty of the offer owner
- all exchanged products become EXCHANGED and isListed=false
- exchanged product identifiers update: isPreOwned=true, exchangeCount++, lastExchangedAt=now
- new owner can later relist manually using PATCH /products/:id/relist
List notifications for the authenticated user with cursor pagination (PROTECTED).
Register an Expo push token for authenticated user (PROTECTED).
Unregister Expo push token for authenticated user (PROTECTED).
Mark a notification as read (PROTECTED).
Mark all notifications as read (PROTECTED).
Delete all notifications for authenticated user (PROTECTED).

Get app version update policy (PUBLIC).

Query:
- platform: android|ios
- channel: production|beta|alpha
- currentVersion: current app semantic version

Upload app version policy document (ADMIN ONLY).

Supports channel-aware policy format with channels.production|beta|alpha.

variable.description: Current login identifier used for OTP requests
JWT access token from verify-otp response. Copy and paste the token here after authentication.
JWT refresh token captured from verify-otp response
Authenticated user id captured from profile response
Authenticated user email captured from profile response
Authenticated user phone captured from profile response
Latest created product id captured from Create Product
Latest created free product id captured from Create Free Product
Image id to use for Delete Product Image
Latest request thread id captured from Create Product Request
Active transaction id captured from Get Active Transaction
Warning message from Accept Request when override threshold is near
Admin API key used by admin-protected endpoints
Reveal request id for contact reveal respond endpoint
Notification id used to mark a specific notification as read
App platform for version policy checks: android|ios
App channel for version policy checks: production|beta|alpha
Current app semantic version sent to policy endpoint
